programme.desc: As the Ottoman Empire collapses throughout Turkey in 1922, a number of adventurers from all over the world sign on to protect the locals from thieves and marauders--for a hefty price. Two such mercenaries are Adam and Josh, who are hired by provincial Turkish governor Osman. Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. Along the way, our 'heroes' decide to forget their mission and abscond with the gold, but their plans are foiled by their own inherent ineptitude--and by the bothersome interference of duplicitous Colonel Elci.

programme.title: Local Knowledge
programme.desc: Water quality is everything—and the Star brite - SeaSafe team is back at it for the second year in a row! Led by Cory Redwine, Conservation Director of Project SeaSafe, this is the 4th Annual Clean Water Collective and it’s bigger than ever. This time, we’re in Grant, Florida, where 4 million clams are being released into the Indian River Lagoon, paired with the planting of thousands of mangroves, oyster work by CCA and trash clean ups to help restore one of Florida’s most critical ecosystems. But it’s not just about hard work—it’s about connection. With local captains, fishing legends, and the Local Knowledge crew on hand, we hit the water to show why this place is worth fighting for. From clam drops by drone, to in-water mangrove planting, to monster snook catches, this is hands-on conservation at its best. This two-part series kicks off with action, heart, and the kind of hope only a healthy waterway can bring. Don’t miss Part 1—where conservation meets community and everyone gets their hands wet.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: It’s time to go to work. Now that we’ve met our companies, Kevin and the A-team are ready to hit the ground running. NuEhtix, Dr Price Vitamins, Stream2Sea and Clear Water get a deep dive round table session from Kevin and His A-team. We also get to meet the A-Team players and what make them titans in their trades. Tune in to see the insights the team come up with and how the companies apply it to build their brands.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This week is all about health and wellness. Kyle Reyes is back with Nuethix for an inspection into the inner workings of their company.. and his health. Then, the team gets a closer look at Dr. Price’s chiropractor practice and his unique start to the vitamin operations game. Then, get your questions about Clear Water quenched as we take a deeper dive into the company and their global legacy. To cap off the episode, two A-Team members head over to check out Stream2Sea’s innovative factory.

programme.title: Beyond the Close
programme.desc: Ladies and gentlemen, it's time to close the deal on Beyond the Close! Join us for the grand finale and winner celebration episode, where we'll reveal the triumphant super-agent who has risen to the very top of the competition. But that's not all. Get ready to hear firsthand from the contestants themselves as they reflect on their 90-day journey and share their growth, learnings, and future aspirations. It's a night of triumph, tears, and unforgettable moments as we bid farewell to the most thrilling season yet. And as if that wasn't enough, we have a very special guest in store. The one and only Christine Quinn, star of Netflix's Selling Sunset, will be joining us for the festivities. She'll be sharing her insights on the industry and giving us a glimpse into what it takes to be a top realtor. But wait, there's more! We'll be taking you on an exclusive tour of some of Miami's most luxurious properties, hosted by none other than some of America's top developers and agents. So sit back, relax, and get ready to be transported beyond the close.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Ken Shamrock’s Iron Man competition comes to a head as two contestants battle it out for the number one spot. Every strike, every takedown matters—because only one can walk away crowned the victor. But there’s no time to celebrate. It’s mission day. After a quick live-fire break, the team receives critical intel from the ISR daylight crew. The risk spikes as night falls and the mission is suddenly altered, forcing the contestants to adapt on the fly. With Red Cat providing coordination from above, the squad is redeployed under new marching orders and even higher stakes. A partially compromised team makes survival uncertain, but when the moment of truth arrives, the team leader takes decisive action—leading a direct breach on the target. One bold decision shifts the course of the mission entirely, and its success now hangs by a thread.

programme.title: S1E2 Moto
programme.desc: The journey continues as we follow two brothers on their 2,300-kilometer adventure across Morocco. Two brothers. Two motorcycles. Ride along with GoPro Family members Carlos and Alex Costa as they experience vibrant cities, breathtaking beaches, and the adventure of a lifetime. Plus, enjoy bonus footage of Jeremy Seewer. With 50 podiums, 11 victories, 17 race wins, and five FIM Motocross World Championship silver medals, his record is remarkable — yet his story goes far beyond the numbers.

Meet Teigan Nash, co-founder of Girls Who Glow, inspiring young women everywhere. Plus, experience even more of the very best from GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S3E1 Moto
